Name: Validation - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Ah Thats the problem In case 2 close_order appears twice in sequence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In process trees the XOR means exactly one of the children is chosen For the successful path xor_node chooses successful_subtree successful_subtree executes authorize_payment package_items ship_order in parallel Then the sequence continues with close_order from the root For the cancel path xor_node chooses cancel_subtree cancel_subtree executes cancel_order close_order sequence Then the sequence continues with close_order from the root So yes in the cancel path close_order happens twice

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - IND
Text: This is a clear violation of domain logic an order should only be closed once
